name: E-1 severity override: doctor --explain emits effective_severity=error when rules: { id: error } in profile
command: printf 'rules:\n  g-ts-001: error\n' > p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --explain g-ts-001 --profile p.yaml 2>err.txt; grep -q 'effective_severity=error' err.txt && grep -q 'rule_will_run=true' err.txt && echo resolved 1>&2
